chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.4041 — Equipment

A golf cart operated under Section 551.404 (Operation on Highway Authorized by Municipality or Certain Counties) must have the following equipment:

    (1) headlamps;

    (2) taillamps;

    (3) reflectors;

    (4) parking brake; and

    (5) mirrors.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B.1548), Sec. 19, eff. June 14, 2019.*
